title: Uhm..Did i just get experience ?
description: Minecraft mod that gives you experience for breaking anything in the game!
body:
View the whole bio on CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/uhm-did-i-just-get-experience


**Uhm.. Did i just get experience: Small description
With this mod you get experience when breaking every block, item in the game. The mod also works for other mods such as: Biome O' plenty, Create, Ad astra, and many more!
Can't say more about it unfortunately, its just a easy mod!**

**I say give it a try :)**

## Fabric: 1.21.1 will come ( soon )



![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/343a4cdc7be7fa26dfd02e5d47dfbffa99016f2f.png)
## This mod is created with: intellij
